title: History Replay Detail Hit Highlighting — Matched Number Visual Display
css_classes_added: replay-number-token — base badge for individual number display
replay-number-token--hit — green highlight for matched numbers
replay-row--hit — subtle row background for hit rows

js_changes.fmtNumberTokens: New helper: renders number array as individual token spans; hitSet built from hit_numbers (preferred) or predicted∩actual fallback (display-only, no DB write)
js_changes.renderDetailRows: Updated to use fmtNumberTokens for predicted_numbers and actual_numbers columns; uses replay-row--hit and replay-result-badge--hit/miss classes

fallback_behavior.hit_numbers_empty_or_null: Computes intersection of predicted_numbers ∩ actual_numbers locally in JS (display-only, no DB write)

ux.predicted_numbers_col: Individual badges; hit numbers show green replay-number-token--hit
ux.actual_numbers_col: Individual badges; hit numbers show green replay-number-token--hit
ux.result_badge: Green 命中 badge for hits, neutral 未命中 for misses

proof_no_db_write: fmtNumberTokens is a pure JS function; no fetch/XHR/db call; fallback is in-memory Set computation
